remaining_params.StackDescription: CARDNAME deals X damage to {p:Targeted}{c:Targeted}. If a creature is dealt damage this way, it loses indestructible until end of turn. If that creature would die this turn, exile it instead.
remaining_params.SpellDescription: CARDNAME deals X damage to any target. If a creature is dealt damage this way, it loses indestructible until end of turn. If that creature would die this turn, exile it instead.
